# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Send details to: **hectorfranco@nowo.tech**

Include: type of issue, affected files/paths, steps to reproduce, and impact when possible.

Full policy and integrator guidance: [`docs/SECURITY.md`](../docs/SECURITY.md).

## Contact

- **Maintainer**: [Héctor Franco Aceituno](https://github.com/HecFranco)
- **Organization**: [nowo-tech](https://github.com/nowo-tech)
